Package controllers.gui.actionannotations

Class SaveLastVisitedPageUrlAction

  • java.lang.Object
    • play.mvc.Results
      • play.mvc.Action<SaveLastVisitedPageUrlAction.SaveLastVisitedPageUrl>
        • controllers.gui.actionannotations.SaveLastVisitedPageUrlAction
  • public class SaveLastVisitedPageUrlAction
extends play.mvc.Action<SaveLastVisitedPageUrlAction.SaveLastVisitedPageUrl>
    Annotation definition for Play actions: logging of each action call, e.g. 'gui_access - GET /jatos/19/run (admin)'
